final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing full-screen smartphone advertisement screenshot for a flagship phone launch campaign, sized at 1080×1920, brand-exposure type with visual impact as the top priority.

Style/medium: needs a high-impact flagship-launch ad aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be full-screen vertical layout, 1080×1920 proportions, immersive edge-to-edge design
Subject: must include a premium flagship smartphone as the hero product, centered and dominant
Scene/backdrop: needs a dramatic, brand-stage backdrop — exact environment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a high-contrast, visually striking atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a bold, premium direction — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a sleek, glass-and-metal premium surface treatment — exact finish is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "OPPO Find X9 Pro" (large, primary hero text), "OPPO" (wordmark/logo placement)
Constraints: must preserve full-screen ad format, portrait orientation, brand-exposure visual hierarchy with product as focal point
Avoid: must avoid cluttered layouts, low-contrast text, budget-tier aesthetics
